name: invalid_skip_merge
description: The bot cites a flag that does not exist — an INVALID claim the kernel discards without a fix. The next round is clean and the loop merges. Classifier response is the legacy pipe form.

rounds.body: pass the `--safe` flag here so the writer cannot clobber existing files
rounds.classifier_response: INVALID|claude|sonnet|low|the cited --safe flag does not exist in this CLI
